title: What is Image Manipulation?
bullets: Image Manipulation is like giving a photo superpowers -- letting us crop, rotate, recolor, and transform images to highlight what matters or create something entirely new.
Pixel-level -- Adjust brightness, contrast, color balance
Geometric -- Crop, rotate, flip, scale, warp
Compositing -- Blend, stitch, and layer multiple images
Enhancement -- Sharpen, denoise, restore old photos
